idea-plugin.name: AI Git Commit Writer
idea-plugin.description: AI Git Commit Writer is a lightweight Git commit message generator for JetBrains IDEs and Android Studio. It adds a single action to the Commit panel and uses the user's own OpenAI-compatible API configuration, with DeepSeek defaults. No login, no tool window, no background indexing.
idea-plugin.change-notes: v0.3.5: Fix API key not persisting across restarts.

action.description: Generate a commit message from the selected Git changes
